suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify in the `ui-worker` skill that regression-only fixes for already-correct implementations may add or replace targeted tests instead of skipping test work entirely.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review `fix-annotation-panel-test-failure` found the only required change was a new targeted regression test, and the worker had to document that as a deviation because `.factory/skills/ui-worker/SKILL.md` only describes baseline-test fixes as reusing or skipping tests.

rejectedObservations.observation: Recommend AGENTS/library guidance about fallback ARIA labels on shared UI primitives.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented: mission AGENTS guidance already says fallback ARIA labels should only be added when no visible text or caller-provided label exists and must not override existing accessible names.

rejectedObservations.observation: Recommend changing the `ui-worker` skill example that shows creating `Button.test.ts` for regression work.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous: the reviewed pass state does not show a systemic worker problem beyond the narrower regression-test-only clarification above.
